posts.author: grayerman
posts.body: Predictions: 1 of 3 Pending | Tied for 1st with 267 others We all know this is really just a Texas card.Jacobe Smith, Alden Coria, Adrian Yanez, Yadier Del Valle, Ramiz Brahimaj, Zach Reese, Michael Aswell, John Yannis, and Chris Gutierrez are all names I'd like to see here.They could rebook Smith vs Korean Tyson. Alden Coria vs Estevam or Hyun Sung ParkDel Valle vs Javier ReyesBrahimaj vs Khaos WilliamsReese vs Powerbar

posts.author: elitemmapicks
posts.body: Predictions: 3 of 3 Pending | Tied for 1st with 267 others Amanda Ribas vs Fatima KlinePick: Kline via decision88% of Tapology users (8 users) are picking Kline (28% decision)Kline is 6.9 years younger (26.0 vs 32.9)Kline has 1” reach edge (67” vs 66”)Kline has +2.30 strike differential/min vs +0.97Kline proj. +7.6 significant strikes attemptedKline proj. +8.6 significant strikes landedKline proj. +12.5 head strikes landedKline proj. 0.25 knockdowns vs 0.03Ribas proj. 2.0 takedowns landed (3.9 attempts) vs 1.3 takedowns landed (3.5 attempts)Ribas proj. 4.4 mins of control time vs 2.6 minsRibas proj. 0.60 submission attempts vs 0.00Kline proj. 37.5% finish chance vs 17.5% and 45.0% decision

posts.author: Khabib is the goat
posts.body: Predictions: 3 of 3 Pending | Tied for 1st with 267 others i think the mainevent should be aljamain sterling vs arnold allen, comain jacobe smith vs saygid izagakhmaev 5 rounds, featured bout jared cannonier vs cld, maincard 4 geoff neal vs kevin holland, maincard 5 derrick lewis vs tyrell fortune, maincard opener amanda ribas vs fatima kline, featured prelim zach reese vs kelvin gastelum
